mapper.insert: insert into article(userId, title, createTime, updateTime, favor) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{favor})
insert into section(articleId, orderId, type, content) values (#{articleId}, #{orderId}, #{type}, #{content})
mapper.select: select * from section where articleId = #{articleId} order by orderId
select * from remark where sectionId = #{sectionId} order by sectionId
mapper.insert: insert into remark(sectionId, userId, content, type, favor, createTime) values (#{sectionId}, #{userId}, #{content}, ${type}, #{favor}, #{createTime})
